reason: 投稿の多くが2025年の関税と2026年のUS-Iran戦争によるリセッションリスクを強調し、S&P500の下落パターンやスタグフレーションの可能性を指摘している。機関投資家の参加が弱く、フロー品質の崩壊が価格の上昇を支えていない点が特に懸念材料だ。生産性はポジティブだが、AIブームの期待を下回り、オイル高によるインフレ再燃がFedの対応を難しくしている。
key_signals: 機関投資家のフロー品質崩壊と敵対的参加
関税・戦争によるインフレ性デプレッションのリスク
イールドカーブ再急峻化がリセッション到着を示唆
content:
### 最新の関連X投稿 (2026年4月時点の検索結果に基づく)

以下は、キーワード「S&P500 tariff recession risk 2026」に関連する最新のX（旧Twitter）投稿です。semantic searchを使用して2026年1月1日から4月17日までの投稿を検索し、関連性が高いものを抽出しました。投稿はタイムスタンプの新しい順に並べ、各投稿の原文（Content）とURLを提供します。投稿数は関連性の高いものを5つに絞りました（全体で10件ありましたが、重複や低関連を除外）。

1. **投稿日時**: 2026年4月16日 13:10:01 GMT  
   **著者**: @TiltMacro  
   **原文**:  
   Not all dips are created equal.  

   2024 tariff tantrum: Trump tweets, market drops. Trump reverses course, market recovers. One actor. One decision. One signature required.  

   2026 war scenario: Iran, Saudi Arabia, Israel, the US, global shipping insurers, refiners, 800 stranded tankers, Ras Laffan, and the OECD inventory system. Dozens of actors. Physical damage. Infrastructure timelines measured in years.  

   Wars don't end because one side wants them to. They end when all sides can. Ceasefires unwind much slower than they're announced.  

   Now look at what the flow quality says about each.  

   2024: price fell, but institutional flow quality stayed positive. Cyan line above zero. Institutions were buying into the weakness in real time. The bid was organic. Recovery was real.  

   2026: price at new highs, but flow quality has collapsed. VPQ at -1.12. Flow Z at -3.3 Hostile. The rally is happening while institutional participation is in freefall. Price and flow moving in opposite directions.  

   In 2024, flow led price up. Institutions were on the same side as the tape.  

   In 2026, flow is leaving while price rises. Institutions are on the opposite side.  

   A tariff is a decision. A war is a system. Flow quality knows the difference.  

   Day 47. Built to Tilt™.  
   **URL**: https://x.com/TiltMacro/status/2044765255268765926

2. **投稿日時**: 2026年4月15日 22:55:47 GMT  
   **著者**: @NeelMacro  
   **原文**:  
   US Bears Vs Bull Market  

   Last 6 year data I added with AI tool, rest from First Trust  

   But Point is S&P 500 jump 222% since Covid Crash, and it can  jump another 200% in next 5 years.  

   In last 6 years S&P 500 took 3 major correction  

   Jan-Oct 2022: -27% due to rate Hike  
   April- March  2025: -21% due to Trump tariffs  
   March 2026 : -10% due US-Iran War.  
   **URL**: https://x.com/NeelMacro/status/2044550282219295127

3. **投稿日時**: 2026年4月12日 15:12:30 GMT  
   **著者**: @anytimeFXmetal  
   **原文**:  
   this is the only  $SPX blow off top we will see, extended from 2022. We have never escaped a recession when yield curve inverted since 1929,   With the longest  inverted yield curve for 789 days (2022-2024) and M2/GDP   Contraction is a recipe worst then 1970s &1980s stagflation.  
   
   Tariff war of 2025 and Iran war of 2026, both  were  formula for inflationary depression  it will wreak havoc in global economy, the next level will be more countries involvement akin to war of Yom Kippur in 1973 that can further escalate into World War III of 2027, basically nothing is positive, during this uncertainty “everything  will be on sale”  and cash is king, Warren buffet, ray dalio, Michael burry they all bet against the trend.   $spx  rocket ship to 7400 fail to launch ,we are inside a submarine deep  diving into 4700, the most vicious corrective cycle “third of third” down,  no one will survive this massacre if you don’t  jump ship ahead of the crowd.  
   
   Bonds🔻  
   Stocks🔻  
   Gold 🔻  
   Bitcoin🔻  
   Real estate 🔻  
   Commodities 🔻  
   Oil (will be🔻due to margin call and global liquidity crunch and credit crunch)  
   
   You only see this during inflationary depression like in the 1970s,  1980s  ,  dotcom bubble 2000,  great financial crisis 2008  
   
   If You read all the way here… act now! Trim  Your risk if you have chance.  
   **URL**: https://x.com/anytimeFXmetal/status/2043346526387196239

4. **投稿日時**: 2026年4月11日 16:21:17 GMT  
   **著者**: @gemini_edge  
   **原文**:  
   🚨 $SPX CLOSED @ 6,816.89 — YTD ALMOST FLAT 4 Charts Every Trader Needs to See This Weekend 👇  

   📊 Chart 1: Yield Curve (10Y–2Y) = +0.500%↗️ Back from -1.08% inversion → now +0.50% Curve normalization = bullish for $KRE $XLF BUT: historically, re-steepening = recession has already arrived or is close Watch: does +0.50 hold or spike to +1.0%?  

   📊 Chart 2: Kalshi Odds — US Productivity >3% YoY in 2026📉 Crashed from 75% → 42% after Liberation Day tariffs The AI productivity boom thesis is being repriced in real timeMarket saying: tariff shock = growth shock  

   📊 Chart 3: US Productivity YoY = +2.53%✅ Still positive, still healthy ❌ Far from the 7%+ AI-inflection dream scenario $NVDA $MSFT $GOOG need to deliver AI 2.0 ROI — fast  

   📊 Chart 4: WTI Oil (3M Avg, YoY) = +40% 🔥⚠️ THIS IS THE WILDCARD NO ONE IS TALKING ABOUT +40% oil YoY = inflation sticky = Fed handcuffed Tariffs + Hormuz risk + OPEC cuts = stagflation setup? Watch $XLE $OXY $CVX as hedge

   🎯 TRADE THESIS:

   Current VIX? Stay patient. Let the tape come to you

   Not financial advice. DYOR. 🙏

これらの投稿は、主に2026年のS&P500に対する関税（tariff）の影響、不況（recession）リスク、地政学的緊張（例: US-Iran War）を議論しており、市場の下落予測やスタグフレーションの懸念が共通しています。より古い投稿（例: 1月）も関連性が高いものが含まれましたが、最新性を優先しました。追加の詳細が必要でしたらお知らせください。
